name: Florence Pugh
description:
Born on January 3, 1996, in Oxford, England, Florence Pugh is a versatile actress recognized for her captivating performances. Raised in a creative family, her breakthrough came in 2016 with "Lady Macbeth," earning praise and award nominations. Influenced by her dancer mother, Pugh's siblings also contribute to the arts. In 2018, she gained international recognition in "Outlaw King." The pivotal year 2019 showcased her versatility with "Midsommar" and an Academy Award nomination for "Little Women." Pugh joined the Marvel Cinematic Universe in 2020's "Black Widow" and starred in "Marry Me." Off-screen, her social media reflects a candid and down-to-earth personality. Beyond acting, Pugh advocates for social issues, aligning with her commitment to authenticity in the entertainment industry.
